title: Shocking New AI Just Hit 12 Million Tokens With 1000x Less Compute
summary: Subquadratic released SubQ, a model achieving 12 million token context with claimed 1000x reduction in attention compute via sparse attention architecture (SSA). The capability enables direct reasoning over full documents, contracts, and codebases without retrieval-augmented generation or chunking strategies.
